title: Lightning Mod
description: This mod has some new items which is based on lightning and makes playing Minecraft very fun.
body:
## **This mod adds lightning items**.. obviously
**This incredible Minecraft mod will make your Minecraft world fun to play with many new items and everything is based on thunder or lightning.**

**This mod includes many items and some blocks but the main ones are:**
- A lightning blade
- A lightning bow
- A lightning block which spawns lightning when powered by redstone
- A thunder orb launcher which can turn the weather to thunder
### **And much, much more**


Explore, battle, and create with the lightning mod. Download now.

[![Forge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightning-mod/versions?l=forge)
[![NeoForge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightning-mod/versions?l=neoforge)

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
